presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — My Financial Advisory Venture Pitch

slides.title: Day 15 — My Financial Advisory Venture
slides.body:
Not your insurance career.
Not your product.
Not your sales presentation.
An entrepreneur's pitch.
slides.speakerNotes:
Open with the contrast.
This week built toward one deliverable: your venture pitch.

slides.title: Pitch Structure
slides.body: Problem I solve · Target market · Advisory experience · FNA process · Client acquisition · Business growth · Why AIA as platform
slides.speakerNotes:
Walk each section with examples from the week.
This is a venture pitch to mentors and coaches — not a product demo.

slides.title: 120-Hour Gate Evidence
slides.body: Opportunity memo · FNA notes · Growth Engines · Platform rationale · Venture pitch
slides.speakerNotes: Gate checklist. Portfolio + BP Chapter 3 artifacts.

slides.title: Presentation Standards
slides.body: 8 minutes · Entrepreneur presence · Evidence from Weeks 1–3
slides.speakerNotes: Panel Q&A standards. Mentor scoring rubric.
